scripts.testSuite: powershell -Command "git fetch origin gh-pages; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force temp-gh-pages }; git worktree add temp-gh-pages gh-pages; Set-Location temp-gh-pages; git reset --hard origin/gh-pages; Set-Location ..; if (Test-Path allure-results) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path allure-results | Out-Null; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages/history) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path allure-results/history | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path temp-gh-pages/history/* -Destination allure-results/history/ -Force }; try { npm run test } finally { npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report; git worktree remove temp-gh-pages --force; npm run report:publish }"
scripts.testSuiteDebug: powershell -Command "git fetch origin gh-pages; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force temp-gh-pages }; git worktree add temp-gh-pages gh-pages; Set-Location temp-gh-pages; git reset --hard origin/gh-pages; Set-Location ..; if (Test-Path allure-results) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path allure-results | Out-Null; Write-Host 'gh-pages history contents:'; Get-ChildItem temp-gh-pages/history -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages/history) { Write-Host 'Injecting History...'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path allure-results/history | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path temp-gh-pages/history/* -Destination allure-results/history/ -Force; Write-Host 'allure-results/history after copy:'; Get-ChildItem allure-results/history }; try { npm run test } finally { Write-Host 'allure-results/history before generate:'; Get-ChildItem allure-results/history -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report; Write-Host 'allure-report/history after generate:'; Get-ChildItem allure-report/history -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git worktree remove temp-gh-pages --force }"
